rag_rules: Fix unresolved references in AGREE contracts by ensuring all identifiers are visible in the current scope or properly declared as helpers.
When AGREE reports type mismatches, align helper declarations with the types of their expressions or remove invalid clauses.
generic_rules: In AGREE contracts, only reference visible AADL features or previously declared equation helpers.
Use only valid AGREE scalar types (int, real, bool) in constant and equation declarations.
Avoid placing implementation-specific bindings in component type scopes; use implementation scopes for such assignments.
Ensure that guarantee expressions are well-typed and do not reference unresolved identifiers.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts must be enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks.
Component type annexes are for assumptions, guarantees, constants, and equation declarations; implementation annexes are for bindings and assignments.
anti_patterns: Do not introduce package-qualified identifiers in AGREE that are not present in the AADL model or its dependencies.
Do not place guarantee statements in implementation scopes; use type scopes for such contracts.
